story.iWant: to generate a complete theme.json with all primitives

task.title: Implement Theme Synthesizer Module
task.subtask: 1.1: Read {{extracted_primitives}} from Phase 2 output
1.2: Build meta section with name, version "1.0", current date, and sources list
1.3: Map extracted colors to theme.json colors structure
1.4: Map extracted typography to theme.json typography structure
1.5: Map extracted shapes to theme.json shapes structure
1.6: Copy personality classification to personality section

task.title: Implement CSS Variable Derivation
task.subtask: 2.1: Define CSS variable naming convention per architecture
2.2: Ensure all theme values can map to CSS custom properties
2.3: Document CSS variable mappings in theme structure

task.title: Add Layouts Placeholder
task.subtask: 3.1: Create empty layouts section in theme.json
3.2: Define expected layout template references

task.title: Update Setup Workflow Instructions - Phase 3
task.subtask: 4.1: Expand Phase 3 placeholder (Step n="3") in instructions.md
4.2: Add action to read {{extracted_primitives}} from Phase 2
4.3: Add action to construct complete theme.json object
4.4: Add action to validate JSON structure before writing
4.5: Add Write tool call to save theme.json
4.6: Add output block showing theme generation summary
4.7: Update status.yaml with phase completion

task.title: Implement JSON Validation
task.subtask: 5.1: Validate all required fields present
5.2: Validate all hex colors are valid format
5.3: Ensure no null or placeholder values
5.4: Add error handling if validation fails

task.title: Testing and Validation
task.subtask: 6.1: Test theme generation with complete extraction data
6.2: Test theme.json is valid JSON
6.3: Test all required sections are present
6.4: Test CSS variable derivation
6.5: Verify meta.sources matches input assets
6.6: Verify personality section matches Phase 2 classification

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Given brand primitives have been extracted, when the theme file is generated, then `.slide-builder/theme.json` contains: meta (name, version, created, sources), colors, typography, shapes, layouts sections
The theme file is valid JSON
All CSS custom properties can be derived from the theme (--color-primary, --font-heading, etc.)
The theme includes personality classification with reasoning notes

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Complete theme.json schema definition including meta, colors, typography, shapes, layouts, and personality sections. Theme Synthesizer module spec for merging extraction data.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: Theme stored at `.slide-builder/theme.json`. CSS variables pattern: --color-primary, --font-heading, etc. Version starts at "1.0".

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: User story definition with acceptance criteria for theme.json generation. Prerequisites Story 2.2 complete.

doc.title: Previous Story - Brand Primitive Extraction
doc.snippet: Implemented Phase 2 extraction. Output stored in {{extracted_primitives}} for Theme Synthesizer. Source priority: website (1.0) > PDF (0.8) > images (0.6).

artifact.reason: Phase 3 placeholder needs expansion to implement theme.json generation from {{extracted_primitives}}
Contains required_skills config and state_file path needed for status updates
Status file to be updated with phase: "theme-generation-complete" after theme.json creation

package.name: puppeteer
package.reason: HTML-to-image conversion for export (not used in this story)

package.name: googleapis
package.reason: Google Slides API (not used in this story)

dependencies.note: This story does not use npm dependencies directly - all operations use Claude Code built-in capabilities (Write tool for file creation)

interface.name: {{extracted_primitives}}
theme.json

constraints.constraint: 100% alignment with BMAD workflow pattern - use XML action/check/output tags in instructions.md
System generates a complete theme file with all primitives (colors, typography, shapes, layouts)
Theme stored at `.slide-builder/theme.json` - no other location
Version starts at "1.0" for initial theme creation
Layouts section is placeholder until Story 2.4 generates templates
All processing local via Claude - no external uploads of theme data

tests.standards: Per tech spec, use manual verification for theme synthesis. Test that theme.json: (1) is valid JSON parseable without errors, (2) contains all required sections (meta, colors, typography, shapes, layouts, personality), (3) has no null or placeholder values in required fields, (4) hex colors match #RRGGBB format. Integration test: run /sb:setup through Phase 3 and verify theme.json created with correct structure.

ideas.idea: Verify theme.json exists and contains all required sections after Phase 3 completes
Parse generated theme.json with JSON.parse() to verify validity
Check that every colors/typography/shapes value can map to documented CSS variable names
Verify personality.classification is one of: bold, minimal, corporate, playful; and personality.notes is non-empty
Verify meta.sources array contains references to input assets from Phase 1
Verify layouts section exists with placeholder file references for 7 template types
